field_values.action_summary: A respectful but menacing Martian warrior presents the protagonist with specialized combat arms and ornaments, marking his transition from outsider to trainee.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups on ornate weaponry and ornaments; Medium shots of martian_warrior's intimidating presence; Reaction shots of protagonist
movement_notes: Precise appearance and fit of the specialized Martian combat arms
Precise appearance and fit of the Martian ornaments
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH009_SC001

## Production Intent
The scene must establish the protagonist's transition from an outsider to a trainee within Martian warrior culture. This is achieved through a ritualistic gift-giving ceremony that balances respect with underlying menace, utilizing specialized combat arms and ornaments to signify his new status.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (Earthman; characterized by extreme agility/high-leaping capabilities)
- martian_warrior (Respectful but menacing presence)

## Required Environments
- Exterior/Plaza area

## Continuity Constraints
- The specific appearance and fit of the new Martian arms and ornaments must be maintained throughout the ritual.

## Beat List
- BT001: martian_warrior approaches protagonist in a respectful but menacing manner.
- BT002: martian_warrior presents the specialized combat arms and ornaments to protagonist.
- BT003: protagonist receives the gear, marking his transition from outsider to trainee.
